trivia_bullets.text: Dismal Backwater is the most reprinted card in this inventory batch: its 20th printing as of Aetherdrift (February 2025), first appearing in Khans of Tarkir (September 2014). It is legal in every major format including Pauper.

"The doomed souls of the Speed Demons race in uneasy unity, each one hoping to escape their own fate." The Speed Demons are a racing team from Duskmourn composed of possessed racers and their tormentors, described as the advancing edge of Valgavoth's 'mansionization' process across the Multiverse.

Artist Wayne Wu's rendering foregrounds Psychopomp iconography (ferryman, glowing soul, skeletal trees) native to the gothic Speed Demons faction, giving the gain land a faction-specific visual identity distinct from prior printings.

related_cards.name: Dismal Backwater
related_cards.note: first printing of this oracle text

related_cards.name: Speed Demon
related_cards.note: faction commander for Speed Demons racing team in flavor text
